docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANAE, MANJARREZ ANGELEIGH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-03-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT LANAE, MANJARREZ ANGELEIGH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED APR-21-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANAE, MANJARREZ ANGELEIGH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP EMRITUS OF TOWING. DEFENDANT MANJARREZ ANGELEIGH LANAE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
